description: Fueled by fiction & creativity (especially Japanese games, music & manga) since I'm young, my entire life thus far has been nothing but a total focus on what drives and inspires me. Fascinated by interesting sounds and ambitious visuals, I've always been drawn to media that bring out the best aspects of both music and immersive aspects of all visual arts. Even back when I wasn't even a teen, I started drawing comics simply because I felt like it, and already felt a surge of inspiration just from organizing projects with friends. Nowadays, I've got a strong focus on  music, especially in the doujin/DTM scene. God knows what the future has in store for me, but I'm all for discovering new passions. All that I know is that for now, I'd do anything to work even further in the world of music & games!

Erithacus View.title: Erithacus View
Erithacus View.description: My professional self-business! I will choose to go through this whenever doing specific comissioned or non-doujin work of all kinds - music production, booking, translation, advising...

Counterfest.title: COUNTERFEST RECORDS
Counterfest.description: A new sublabel of KodamaSounds dedicated to our arrange albums & original tek albums, aimed towards free albums inspired by the bootleg & doujin scene.

DJ.title: DJ Mixing
DJ.description: Started mixing all kinds of genres, and hoping to make live sets sooner or later.

Sound Production.title: Sound Production / DTM
Sound Production.description: Producing music on Reaper. In a mostly techno & IDM style, and strives to craft songs in as many genres as possible.

VGMDB.title: VGMdb Trusted Editor
VGMDB.description: 3000+ albums added & 7000+ albums edited for the database, from VGM to Doujin Music.

KodamaSounds.title: KodamaSounds
KodamaSounds.description: Organized and supervised all KodamaSounds releases, featuring community driven arrange and original work albums. 20+ hours/albums released, for +300 released songs, with more and more constantly coming.

NITW.title: Night in the Woods French Fantranslator
NITW.description: Lead fantranslator for Night in the Woods. Planned for completion in 2026.

KodamaSoft.title: KodamaSoft
KodamaSoft.description: Founder of a french doujin circle, working on the self developed KODAMA COMET games & visual novel projects.

RB.title: A&R for Rolling Bassline Recordings
RB.description: Contact & management accross worldwide artists on a commercial Hard Techno / Psystyle label.

Twitch.title: Twitch Streaming
Twitch.description: Full time & rigorous English + French streams of various games.

KodamaSoft.title: 140VGM / 140ABGM Co-Founder
KodamaSoft.description: Administration of an account dedicated to posting cuts of VGM+Anime Music. Also hosted an user-requested radio program on Twitch, and interviewed various independant composers.

Katana Zero.title: Katana ZERO Speedrunning
Katana Zero.description: Light competitor near the game's release, as well as early moderator.

VGM Quiz.title: VGM Quiz Admin
VGM Quiz.description: Administration of a database and community for a VGM+Anime web music game.

Youtube.title: Video-Game Critic
Youtube.description: Made Youtube critics & reviews of games of all kinds.

Lisa.title: LISA French Fantranslator
Lisa.description: Self-developed a fan localization & fan patch for LISA the Painful & The Joyful in French.

VGAOfficialArt.title: VGAOfficialArt Founder
VGAOfficialArt.description: Posted official artworks & concepts arts of video games and other forms of visual arts.

passions.6: ...Arcade Games (Rhythm, STGs), as well as Visual Novels & Narrative Games
passions.7: ...Game Music of the things above! ...and a lot of more video game music, really.

passions.15: Meeting new people and horizons, exchanging passionately with all kinds of people
